name: Granulate
description: Granulate — Continuous profiling and runtime optimization agent reducing compute costs without code changes.

seo.title: Granulate — CDN / Edge / Acceleration
seo.meta_description: Granulate: Granulate — Continuous profiling and runtime optimization agent reducing compute costs without code changes.

when_to_use: Continuous runtime profiling reducing CPU usage by 20-40%
Autonomous compute optimization without code changes
Reducing cloud bills by optimizing running workloads in place
JVM and Python application performance tuning in production
Cost savings on Kubernetes workloads via Granulate agents

pros: Automatic runtime optimization without code changes
Supports JVM, Python, and Go workloads
cons: Savings vary widely by workload type
review.verdict: Compelling for compute-heavy services that can prove the agent delivers savings, skeptical for lightweight apps.
review.best_for: Compute-intensive backends on large instance fleets with JVM or Python hot paths
review.not_for: Lightweight web apps or teams unwilling to run closed-source agents in production

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
